title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DSV India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DSV India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!
